new_value: Implemented in PRs #109-112: git-signing preset in onboarding, MachineView rendering fix, auto-detect prompt, post-configure verification

Core new-machine setup flow landed in PRs #104-112: SSH key detection/generation (#104), GitHub key registration (#105), smart prompt defaults (#106), setup verification (#107), MachineView rendering (#109), git-signing preset (#110), auto-detect prompt (#111), post-configure verify (#112)

old_value: {"id":"go4dot-rql","title":"Convert sync/operation confirmation dialogs to floating overlays","description":"Sync confirmation, override detection, backup choice dialogs still take over entire screen. {"id":"go4dot-cqu","title":"Constrain modal overlay sizing to 60-80% of screen","description":"Modal adapter functions produce nearly full-screen content. Modals should be constrained to ~60-80% width and ~50-70% height so dimmed dashboard is visible around edges. Each modal type may need different sizing.","status":"open","priority":1,"issue_type":"task","created_at":"2026-02-07T17:00:17Z","created_by":"Nic van Dessel","updated_at":"2026-02-07T17:00:17Z","work_type":"mutex"}

{"id":"go4dot-5bw","title":"Fix overlay dimming to preserve dashboard visual structure","description":"Current dimContent() strips all ANSI and re-renders as gray text.
